visualizerParams.title: Bug Squasher: Radix Parameter
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The `parseInt` function is behaving unexpectedly because the radix (base) is not explicitly specified. Fix the call for base 2.
visualizerParams.buggyCode: function toDecimal(bin) {\n  return parseInt(bin); // Bug: potentially defaults to base 10\n}

solution.explanation: It's always a best practice to specify the 'radix' (the second argument to `parseInt`) to avoid ambiguity, especially when working with binary strings.
